name: Pox
description: These festering sacs of pus and gas burst violently on impact.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: These festering sacs of pus and gas burst violently on impact.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Torid, Mutalist Cernos, and Pox being unable to deal damage with their radial attack. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1322604-torid-mutalist-cernos-and-pox-lost-their-radial-attacks-investigating/?ct=1664217549

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Torid and Pox missing their ‘Embed Damage Radius’ and ‘Embed Time’ stats.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed for missing adhere and explosion sounds for the Pox.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Mutalist Cernos and Pox Damage over Time applying self-damage.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Pox missing its AoE Gas cloud.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.changes: The Pox, Acceltra, and Shedu have been given explosion FX tweaks for visual and performance improvement.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Torid and Pox not dealing radial Damage over time when its projectile lands on the ground or otherwise not on an enemy.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.4 + 24.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Energy colors on the Pox when the Tarock Thrown Blade Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.16.2
patchlogs.changes: Pox will no longer play Hit Notification sounds on Damage over Time ticks.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Pox diorama being aggressively zoomed in.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the max number of Pox projectiles Limbo can create in Stasis to 20 before Stasis becomes unstable and closes.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed constant pulsing of the crosshair from Mutalist Cernos and Pox DOT.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Pox not changing its orientation when thrown.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a poor Pox throwing animation when holding a datamass.
Fixed a black mesh appearing on the Pox in the Arsenal.
